title: Decoding Higher Education
text:
While university placement data is public, there is a lack of analytical perspective on how factors like faculty size and location impact a department’s popularity. This project identifies the underlying drivers of success for Industrial Engineering departments in Turkey.
Team Name: [Let It Happen]
Team Members: * Yusuf Bora Çavdar
* Onur Furkan Gök

title: Decoding Higher Education
text:

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
Comprehensive Data: Multi-year data for Industrial Engineering programs dynamically extracted via the thestats package.
Analytical Approach: Moving from descriptive statistics to predictive and actionable insights.
Faculty Factor: Measuring the real impact of academic staff size on student rankings.
Regional Dynamics: Identifying how geographical location influences program popularity.

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
Exploratory Analysis
(Burada harika ggplot2 grafiklerimiz ve yorumlarımız olacak)

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
1. Introduction to Analysis
This section presents our exploratory data analysis and findings. By leveraging the power of tidyverse and ggplot2, we aim to uncover the trends that define Industrial Engineering education in Turkey. We prioritize data-driven narrative over raw outputs.

title: Data Analytics & Results
text:
2. Preliminary Data Exploration
Instead of relying on static Excel files, we establish a direct connection to the YÖK Atlas database. Below, we extract the placement scores and university details for Industrial Engineering departments.
#| label: data-extraction #| message: false #| warning: false #| code-fold: true

title: Data Preparation
text: Our analysis is based on dynamic data retrieval from the YÖK Atlas system. By using the thestats package, we ensure our study is fully reproducible and updated with the latest 2025 statistics.

title: Data Preparation
text:
Data Dictionary



Variable

University_Type

Base_Score

Staff_Count
